Name: DEMO_PARAM
Description: Controls rendering and visual configuration for cutscenes, including grouping masks, image color multipliers, filtering, and environment mapping settings.

Fields.Name: Display Group Mask
Fields.Description: Bitmask controlling which object groups are visible in the scene.

Fields.Name: Memory Block
Fields.Description: Reserved memory block identifier used for demo configuration data.

Fields.Name: Object Display Group Mask
Fields.Description: Additional bitmask controlling visibility of object groups.

Fields.Name: Environment Map Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID used for image-based lighting (IBL) environment reflections.

Fields.Name: Image 0: Multiply Color (Red)
Fields.Description: Red channel multiplier applied to Image 0.

Fields.Name: Image 0: Multiply Color (Green)
Fields.Description: Green channel multiplier applied to Image 0.

Fields.Name: Image 0: Multiply Color (Blue)
Fields.Description: Blue channel multiplier applied to Image 0.

Fields.Name: Filter ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the post-processing or image filter applied to the scene.

Fields.Name: Image 0: Alpha Factor
Fields.Description: Opacity scaling factor applied to Image 0.

Fields.Name: Image 1: Multiply Color (Red)
Fields.Description: Red channel multiplier applied to Image 1.

Fields.Name: Image 1: Multiply Color (Green)
Fields.Description: Green channel multiplier applied to Image 1.

Fields.Name: Image 1: Multiply Color (Blue)
Fields.Description: Blue channel multiplier applied to Image 1.

Fields.Name: Image 1: Alpha Factor
Fields.Description: Opacity scaling factor applied to Image 1.

Fields.Name: Position Factor
Fields.Description: Scaling factor applied to positional transformations.

Fields.Name: Scale Factor
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to object scaling.

Fields.Name: UV Factor
Fields.Description: Scaling factor applied to texture UV coordinates.

Fields.Name: Disable Light ID 1
Fields.Description: Identifier for the first light source that is disabled.

Fields.Name: Disable Light ID 2
Fields.Description: Identifier for the second light source that is disabled.

Fields.Name: Disable SFX ID 1
Fields.Description: Identifier for the first special effect that is disabled.

Fields.Name: Disable SFX ID 2
Fields.Description: Identifier for the second special effect that is disabled.

Fields.Name: LOD Factor Scale
Fields.Description: Scaling multiplier for level-of-detail transitions.
